projects.title: Twitch-Go
projects.subtitle: Personalized Twitch Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Full-stack Spring Boot application for searching Twitch resources (clips, videos, streams) with personalized recommendations. Backed by MySQL on AWS RDS via Spring Data JDBC, with RESTful APIs consuming the Twitch API using OpenFeign HTTP client. Deployed on AWS App Runner via Docker.

projects.title: Document AI
projects.subtitle: Web-Based Q&A Agent for PDF Documents
projects.description: Real-time conversational UI built with React and Ant Design for querying uploaded PDF documents. RESTful API backend built with Node.js and Express, powered by OpenAI GPT-3.5 Turbo and LangChain for document parsing, splitting, retrieval, and response generation.
